translations.de: Es ist ein Symbol für uns.
translations.zh-Hans: 这对我们来说是一个象征。
translations.yue: 對我哋嚟講，佢係一個象徵。
translations.vi: Đó là một biểu tượng đối với chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Het is een symbool voor ons.
translations.hi: यह हमारे लिए एक प्रतीक है।
translations.nb: Det er et symbol for oss.
translations.sv: Det är en symbol för oss.
translations.da: Det er et symbol for os.
translations.ja: それは私たちにとって象徴です。

tokens.explanation: Copular être (est, 3sg) fused with clitic pronoun c’ (ce) functioning as the subject; introduces an identification and links to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the predicate noun 'symbole'.
Predicate nominal complement of the copula, naming what 'ce' is.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase expressing beneficiary/perspective ('pour nous').
Strong/stressed personal pronoun serving as the object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ce cœur est un symbole d’amour.

translations.fr: Ce cœur est un symbole d’amour.
translations.en: This heart is a symbol of love.
translations.es: Este corazón es un símbolo de amor.
translations.de: Dieses Herz ist ein Symbol der Liebe.
translations.it: Questo cuore è un simbolo d'amore.
translations.pt: Este coração é um símbolo de amor.
translations.vi: Trái tim này là biểu tượng của tình yêu.
translations.nl: Dit hart is een symbool van liefde.
translations.hu: Ez a szív a szerelem szimbóluma.
translations.hi: यह दिल प्रेम का प्रतीक है।
translations.el: Αυτή η καρδιά είναι σύμβολο της αγάπης.
translations.nb: Dette hjertet er et symbol på kjærlighet.
translations.sv: Det här hjärtat är en symbol för kärlek.
translations.ro: Această inimă este un simbol al iubirii.
translations.da: Dette hjerte er et symbol på kærlighed.
translations.ja: このハートは愛の象徴です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying 'cœur'; masculine singular before a consonant.
Noun head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary (3sg present) linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article introducing the predicate noun 'symbole'.
Predicate noun; head of the noun phrase complemented by 'd’amour'.
Noun introduced by contracted preposition 'de' → 'd’' before a vowel; forms an of-complement to 'symbole' ('symbole d’amour').

sentences.target: Pour moi, le drapeau est un symbole.

translations.fr: Pour moi, le drapeau est un symbole.
translations.en: For me, the flag is a symbol.
translations.es: Para mí, la bandera es un símbolo.
translations.de: Für mich ist die Flagge ein Symbol.
translations.it: Per me la bandiera è un simbolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 对我来说，旗帜是一个象征。
translations.yue: 對我嚟講，旗幟係一個象徵。
translations.pt: Para mim, a bandeira é um símbolo.
translations.vi: Đối với tôi, lá cờ là một biểu tượng.
translations.nl: Voor mij is de vlag een symbool.
translations.hi: मेरे लिए झंडा एक प्रतीक है।
translations.el: Για μένα η σημαία είναι σύμβολο.
translations.nb: For meg er flagget et symbol.
translations.sv: För mig är flaggan en symbol.
translations.ro: Pentru mine, steagul este un simbol.
translations.da: For mig er flaget et symbol.
translations.ja: 私にとって、旗は象徴です。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a viewpoint/beneficiary phrase ('Pour moi').
Disjunctive/stressed pronoun; object of 'pour'; forms a detached topic phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'drapeau'.
Noun head; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary (3sg present) linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article introducing the predicate noun 'symbole'.
Predicate nominal complement of the copula.

sentences.target: On cherche un symbole pour l’affiche.

translations.fr: On cherche un symbole pour l’affiche.
translations.en: We’re looking for a symbol for the poster.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un símbolo para el póster.
translations.de: Wir suchen ein Symbol für das Plakat.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando un simbolo per il manifesto.
translations.ko: 우리는 포스터를 위한 상징을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为海报寻找一个符号。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度搵一個海報用嘅標誌。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um símbolo para o cartaz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một biểu tượng cho áp phích.
translations.nl: We zoeken een symbool voor de poster.
translations.hi: हम पोस्टर के लिए एक प्रतीक ढूँढ़ रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε ένα σύμβολο για την αφίσα.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter et symbol til plakaten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari simbol untuk poster.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en symbol till affischen.
translations.da: Vi leder efter et symbol til plakaten.
translations.ja: ポスター用のシンボルを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun serving as the subject; often used colloquially for 'we'.
Main verb (3sg present) expressing the action; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article introducing the direct object noun 'symbole'.
Direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/target phrase ('pour l’affiche').
Noun 'affiche' with elided definite article 'l’' (from 'le') before a vowel; object of the preposition 'pour'.
